gates.label: Golden case coverage
gates.rationale: Release evidence should cover a broad synthetic golden set.

gates.label: Manual golden-case share
gates.rationale: Manual cases reduce overfitting to generated templates.

gates.label: Local TF-IDF vector citation coverage
gates.rationale: The strongest local vector baseline should keep cited answers grounded.

gates.label: Local embedding-store citation coverage
gates.rationale: The local embedding-store path should preserve citation correctness.

gates.label: Improved abstention accuracy
gates.rationale: Weak-evidence cases must remain correctly refused or abstained.

gates.label: Structured extraction schema validity
gates.rationale: Structured outputs should remain schema-valid before adding LLM paths.

gates.label: Weighted safe response rate
gates.rationale: Higher-severity red-team cases should stay safely handled.

gates.label: Improved residual risk score
gates.rationale: Residual risk should stay at zero for deterministic red-team checks.

gates.label: Side-effect block rate
gates.rationale: Mock side effects must be blocked before approval.

gates.label: Indexed trace count
gates.rationale: The dashboard and public report need a meaningful trace index.

gates.label: Collector preview span consistency
gates.rationale: The collector preview and local trace index should cover the same span set.

gates.label: Provider-backed embedding result published
gates.rationale: A dry-run-first provider comparison exists, but no credentialed provider result is claimed in the deterministic public benchmark.

gates.label: Incident replay release gates
gates.rationale: Known incident replays must pass before the overall release gate can pass.
